description_en: A fir (momi) grove classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1991-03-28. It is located at Kawamae-machi Shimookeuri Aza Kubota.

name_en: Wild Akayashio azalea habitat of Mitsumori Gorge
description_en: A native azalea habitat classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1991-03-28. It is located at Ōhisa-machi Ōhisa.
A marsh classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1991-03-28. It is located at Ogawa-machi Kamiogawa Aza Numa.
A wild pear (yamanashi) tree classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1993-03-26. It is located at Jōban Fujiwara-machi Aza Bessho.

name_en: Fossil-bearing site within the Ammonite Center
description_en: A fossil-bearing site classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1993-03-26. It is located at Ōhisa-machi Ōhisa Aza Tsurufusa (Ammonite Center).
A shrine grove classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1998-04-10. It is located at Taira Suganami Aza Miyamae.

name_en: Sudajii oak at the site of Kannon-ji
description_en: A sudajii (Castanopsis) tree classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1999-04-30. It is located at Ogawa-machi Shibahara Aza Tateshita.

A weeping cherry (shidarezakura) tree classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1999-04-30. It is located at Ogawa-machi Takahagi Aza Ienomae.
A sudajii (Castanopsis) tree classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1999-04-30. It is located at Watanabe-machi Tabe Aza Shimizu.

A cherry tree known as the sowing cherry (tanemaki-zakura), classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2000-04-28. It is located at Kawamae-machi Shimookeuri Aza Kiwatakasaka.
A Japanese cedar (sugi) classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2002-04-26. It is located at Taira Akai Aza Akaidake.

name_en: Plesiosaur fossil from the Ōku River
description_en: A plesiosaur (long-necked reptile) fossil classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2005-04-27. It is located at Jōban Yumoto-machi Mukaida (Coal and Fossil Museum).

A cherry tree known as the sowing cherry (tanemaki-zakura), classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2006-03-24. It is located at Miwa-machi Shimomisaka Aza Hinata and Eikubo.
A leaf-seeded ginkgo (ohatsukiichō) classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2014-05-01. It is located at Taira Kamikatayose Aza Terashita.
A geological fault classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2016-05-02. It is located at Tabito-machi Kuroda Aza Shionodaira.
A Chinese juniper (byakushin/ibuki) classified as a natural monument. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2024-04-30. It is located at Hisanohama-machi Tanoami.

name_en: Site of the Ōami main mausoleum
description_en: A mausoleum site classified as a historic site among monuments. It is village-designated by Izumizaki Village, with designation dated 1976-06-22.

name_en: Pine row of the old Fumase national highway
description_en: A row of pine trees classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Izumizaki Village, with designation dated 1976-06-22.
A temple bell (bonshō) classified as a craft object among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Izumizaki Village, with designation dated 1978-12-19.
A weeping cherry (shidarezakura) tree classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Izumizaki Village, with designation dated 2007-01-24.
A weeping cherry (shidarezakura) tree classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Izumizaki Village, with designation dated 2007-01-24.

name_en: Main hall of Karasutōge Inari Shrine
description_en: A shrine main hall (honden) classified as a building among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Izumizaki Village, with designation dated 1976-06-22.
A stone monument classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Izumizaki Village, with designation dated 2007-01-24.
A Jizō statue classified among other cultural properties. It is town-designated by Kagamiishi Town. It is located at Kagamiishi-machi Chūō 54.
A tarayō (Ilex latifolia) tree classified as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Kagamiishi Town. It is located at Kagamiishi-machi Kaganuma 76.

A Buddhist nirvana painting classified as a painting among tangible cultural properties. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located within Jōraku-ji at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Tamanashi Aza Idaira 566.

Jōmon-period pottery of the Honna type classified as an archaeological artifact among tangible cultural properties. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It was excavated at the Teraoka site in Kaneyama-machi Honna Aza Teraoka and is stored at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Nakagawa Aza Kamiidaira (Kobushi-kan storehouse).
A castle ruin classified as a historic site among monuments. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Yokota Aza Yōgaiyama.

A Kannon statue (Koyasu Kannon) classified as a sculpture among tangible cultural properties. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located within the Kannon hall at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Ōshi Aza Otsugoe.

name_en: Site of the Komagata fortified residence at Tarabu
description_en: A fortified residence ruin classified as a historic site among monuments. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Tarabu Aza Sawada.

A sutra mound (kyōzuka) classified as a historic site among monuments. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Ōkuriyama Aza Kamiishihara 998-2 and Aza Shimoishihara 566-2.

name_romaji: Mizunuma no dōsojin (Mizunuma sōgyō dōsojin gun)
description_en: A group of monk-form road deity stones (dōsojin) classified as tangible folk cultural properties. They are town-designated by Kaneyama Town. They are located at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Mizunuma Aza Akasawa 582-1.
A road deity stone (dōsojin) classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Oguriyama Aza Dōdaira.
A residence ruin classified as a historic site among monuments. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Yokota Aza Idaira 658-1, 659-1, and 659-5 to 18.

Cliff-carved Buddhist images (magaibutsu) classified as a sculpture among tangible cultural properties. They are town-designated by Kaneyama Town. They are located at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Yamairi Aza Ishihiyama 2692.
A kobushi magnolia tree classified as a natural monument. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located within the precincts of Okami Shrine at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Yamairi Aza Sakedachi.

name_en: Monument of Lord Numazawa the Progenitor
description_en: A stone monument classified as a historic site among monuments. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Numazawa Aza Teranokita.

name_en: Site of the Nakai fortified residence at Takayashiki
description_en: A fortified residence ruin classified as a historic site among monuments. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Tamanashi Aza Takayashiki 1945-1.
A burial mound (kofun) classified as a historic site among monuments. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Ōshi Aza Nukazuka 1576.
A castle ruin classified as a historic site among monuments. It is town-designated by Kaneyama Town. It is located at Kaneyama-machi Ōaza Kawaguchi Aza Kamiiwashita.
